data.content: Validated that the requested script-only implementation is already present on origin/main at 26dfbd5b3d18. scripts/install.sh no longer contains prompt guidance globals/functions or a prompt command path, and scripts/setup.sh no longer contains AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md prompt mutation flow.
